main-title: Our goals are to provide quality, reliable, and prompt service to our clients
main-description: An individual approach to each client, high responsibility for each project — this is our work principle. RT Holdings always guarantees reliable equipment, professional service, and timely delivery.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Get to know our company's activities, values, and goals.
about.companyText1: RT HOLDINGS, founded in 2013 and located in Uzbekistan and South Korea, is engaged in the export of construction machinery. Its main activity is the sale of excavators and special equipment from South Korea to Central Asian countries, as well as to Russia, Belarus, Ukraine, and Arab countries.
about.companyText2: Today, the company is a large holding that includes several subsidiary branches.

story.title: A story of our dedication, expertise, and lasting results
story.description: Our team has a proven track record of success and is dedicated to helping you achieve financial stability and security.

why-choose-us.title: Expertise, secure, success
why-choose-us.description: we understand that choosing the right financial partner is crucial for your success and here are some reasons why RT Holding stands out from the rest.
